badgePuppyDescription: First Wacken? Welcome to the pack.
badgePackMemberDescription: Wherever 10+ stray dogs gather, you're there.
badgePaisTropicalDescription: Brazil baby — sunshine, sweat, and heavy metal.
badgeDeutscherDescription: Ein Bier, bitte! You're playing on home turf.
badgeAmericaFuckYeahDescription: Coming again to save the motherfucking day, yeah!
badgeBelgaDescription: Trappist in the glass, double kicks in the chest — Belgium goes heavy.
badgeCafeteroDescription: Café fuerte, riffs más fuertes — Colombia abriendo el pogo.
badgeOGDescription: You were there when it all started. Eternal respect.
badgeMudSurvivorDescription: Survived the 2023 AND 2025 mud. Lived to tell the tale.
